# @audiotool/nexus

> A JS/TS SDK for interacting with multiplayer projects of the Audiotool DAW in real time, by modifying it while the user works in the DAW.
> The DAW runs in the browser at beta.audiotool.com and supports real-time collaboration; this package enables writing a bot that takes part
> in a collaborative session in real time, reading and writing changes as they happen.

The primary use case of this app is to write "companion" apps running on separate domains
that can be used to enhance the creative workflow of users using the app, by letting them generate
melodies, configuring devices, applying presets, exporting/converting project files, importing assets,
and many other use cases - anything that reads or writes or both a DAW project file.

- This SDK connects to Audiotool's multiplayer backend via WebSocket
- It uses a real-time document model with entities, fields, and transactions
- Authentication uses OAuth2 via accounts.audiotool.com
- Compatible with browsers, Node.js, Bun, and Deno

Markdown versions of all documentation pages are available by appending `.md` to any HTML URL.
For example: `https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/index.html` has a markdown version at `https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/index.html.md`

## Guides

- [Getting Started](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/Getting_Started.html.md): Install, authenticate, and open your first project
- [Overview](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/Overview.html.md): Architecture and concepts — how the multiplayer document model works
- [Authentication](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/Login.html.md): OAuth2 authentication flow for browser and server-side apps
- [API](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/API.html.md): REST API reference for server-side operations (projects, presets, samples, users)
- [All Entities](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/All_Entities.html.md): Complete list of audio devices, effects, and instruments
- [Transaction Errors](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/Transaction_Errors.html.md): Error handling for document mutations

## Core API

- [audiotool](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/functions/index.audiotool.html.md): Browser entry point — handles OAuth2 login and returns an authenticated client
- [createAudiotoolClient](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/functions/index.createAudiotoolClient.html.md): Node.js/server entry point — creates an authenticated client with explicit auth and transport
- [createOfflineDocument](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/functions/index.createOfflineDocument.html.md): Create a local document for testing without a server connection
- [AudiotoolClient](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/types/index.AudiotoolClient.html.md): The client type for making API calls and attaching to projects
- [SyncedDocument](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/types/index.SyncedDocument.html.md): Real-time synchronized project document
- [OfflineDocument](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/types/index.OfflineDocument.html.md): Local project document for offline use and testing

## Document Model

- [TransactionBuilder](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/types/document.TransactionBuilder.html.md): Interface for creating, updating, and deleting entities in a transaction
- [NexusEntity](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/interfaces/document.NexusEntity.html.md): Base interface for all entities in a document
- [NexusField](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/interfaces/document.NexusField.html.md): Base interface for entity fields

## Optional


- [Changelog](https://developer.audiotool.com/js-package-documentation/documents/%F0%9F%93%9C_Changelog.html.md): Version history and breaking changes
